title: Docs Workspace
selectProject: Select a project from the dashboard to open its wiki space.
subtitle: Capture PRDs, ADRs, runbooks, onboarding notes, and execution briefs next to the work.
noFavorites: Mark a page as favorite to keep it here.
noRecent: Recently opened pages show up here.

sidebar.searchPlaceholder: Find a page, template, or runbook

pageTree.empty: No pages yet. Create the first project doc to start the tree.

comments.title: Comments
comments.desc: Page-level and inline discussions stay next to the draft.
comments.readonlyHint: Shared snapshots are read-only. Open the live document to add or resolve comments.
comments.detachedDesc: These comments reference blocks that no longer exist in the current draft.

versionViewer.selectVersion: Select a version to preview it.

templatePicker.title: Select a template
templatePicker.desc: Start from a seeded document or one of your saved team templates.

templateCenter.title: Template Center
templateCenter.desc: Reuse seeded PRDs, ADRs, runbooks, and your own team templates.
templateCenter.noTemplates: Templates will appear here after they load.

relatedTasks.title: Related Tasks
relatedTasks.desc: Work items linked back to this document.
relatedTasks.empty: No tasks linked to this document yet.

taskLinkPicker.title: Select a task
taskLinkPicker.desc: Link an existing task back to this document.

decompose.title: Create Tasks from Selection
decompose.desc: Choose one or more blocks and optionally attach them under an existing parent task.
